scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:check && npm version patch -m "chore(release): %s"
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:check && npm version minor -m "chore(release): %s"
scripts.release:major: npm run release:check && npm version major -m "chore(release): %s"
scripts.release:rc: npm run release:check && npm version prerelease --preid=rc -m "chore(release): %s"
